title: Dooku: Jedi Lost
summary: Star Wars: Dooku: Jedi Lost is an audio drama set in Star Wars that was written by  Cavan Scott and  published on April 30, 2019, by Del Rey Books. An eBook was later released on October 1, 2019, and a paperback edition was published on March 30, 2021.
text:
Star Wars: Dooku: Jedi Lost is an audio drama set in Star Wars that was written by  Cavan Scott and  published on April 30, 2019, by Del Rey Books. An eBook was later released on October 1, 2019, and a paperback edition was published on March 30, 2021.

Reception
James Whitebrook of Gizmodo praised the audio drama's closer examination of Count Dooku's path to the dark side, portrayed as more complicated than depicted in the Star Wars prequels. Sean Keane of CNET also commented on Jedi Lost's exploration of Dooku's early life, calling it "fascinating".
